goal: Design v7.1 Context and Reference Integrity before implementation so AOF can prevent hidden conversation context, undeclared sources, and stale external references from reaching Council approval or release sign-off.
risk: Without this design, v7.1 could become another broad feature slice instead of a bounded integrity layer over context packs, external references, session observability, and Council-visible evidence.
loss_boundary: Do not open v7.1 implementation tasks until the design states the bounded claim, artifacts, audit command, Mission Control projection, Council gate, release gates, and deferred semantic-truth boundary.
acceptance_gates: docs/v7.1-context-reference-integrity-design.md exists and defines context dependency, context pack integrity, external reference integrity, hidden context, context/reference audit checks, release gates, and TASK-090 through TASK-094.
evidence_plan: Runtime situation-assess recognized TASK-089 as the active frontier; docs/v7.x-roadmap.md and docs/vnext-release-plan.md define v7.1; schemas/aof-context-pack.schema.json, schemas/aof-external-ref.schema.json, and work-governance-benchmark provide existing surfaces; docs/v7.1-context-reference-integrity-design.md records the design.
stop_conditions: Stop at design sign-off; defer implementation if the design conflicts with Work Governance, session observability, or QIF semantic uncertainty boundaries.
